zh.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt是John Deincourt和Agnes de Neville的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼。他於1270年與Isabel De Mohun在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年1月6日之前在英國英格蘭越可爾艾姆利，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt是John Deincourt和Agnes de Neville的儿子，出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍可尼。他于1270年与Isabel De Mohun在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年1月6日之前在英国英格兰越可爾艾姆利，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt was born in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Deincourt and Agnes de Neville. He married Isabel De Mohun in 1270, in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 6 January 1327, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt est né à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Deincourt et Agnes de Neville. Il a épousé Isabel De Mohun en 1270, à Branston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 6 janvier 1327, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Branston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt wurde in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John Deincourt und Agnes de Neville geboren. Er hat 1270 in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel De Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 6. Januar 1327 in Emley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt è nato il nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Deincourt e Agnes de Neville. Lui sposato Isabel De Mohun nel 1270, nel Branston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 6 gennaio 1327, nel Emley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Branston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of EyncourtはイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーでJohn DeincourtとAgnes de Nevilleの息子として生まれた。1270年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランストンでIsabel De Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年1月6日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에서 John Deincourt(와)과 Agnes de Neville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브랜스턴에서 Isabel De Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 6일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt nasceu em Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Deincourt e Agnes de Neville. Ele casou-se com Isabel De Mohun em 1270, em Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 6 de janeiro de 1327, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt родился в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Deincourt и Agnes de Neville. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel De Mohun в 1270 г. в местности бранстон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 6 январь 1327 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности бранстон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt nació en Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Deincourt y Agnes de Neville. Se casó con Isabel De Mohun en 1270, en Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 6 de enero de 1327, en Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Branston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
